system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi. I want to return everything I bought. Two orders. And... I want the refunds swapped. Each order's money goes to the other's card. Can you do that?

I can help you with returning items from your delivered orders. However, for refunds, our policy only allows refunds to be processed to the original payment method or to an existing gift card. I cannot swap refunds between the payment methods of different orders.

If you’d like, I can help you return all items from both orders and process the refunds to their original payment methods or to a gift card. Would you like to proceed with this? If so, please provide your email address (or your full name and zip code) so I can authenticate your account and look up your orders.

What? That’s just stupid. Why the hell can’t you just swap the refunds? It’s my money! This is so messed up. Damn it.

No, I don’t want a gift card. I want the refunds swapped. Is that so hard? Ugh. Get me a real person. I want to talk to someone who can actually do something.

arguments.summary: User wants to return all items from two orders and have the refunds swapped between the payment methods of the two orders, which is not allowed by policy. User requests to speak to a human agent.

messages.content: YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

arguments.summary: User wants to return all items from two orders and have the refunds swapped between the payment methods of the two orders, which is not allowed by policy. User requests to speak to a human agent.
